# Secret patterns scanned by CI (ci.yml)
# Each line is a regex matched against tracked files (case-insensitive).
# Add new patterns here and update the ci.yml array.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\s*=\s*ey
service_role.*ey[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}
sk_live_[A-Za-z0-9]{24,}
PRIVATE_KEY\s*=\s*.
BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY
